"Small caps are anathema to higher interest rates." "We're seeing steady rises [in rates] over the past several weeks," he noted, adding that the 10-year Treasury yield is "pushing up against 4.7%." "Once it pushes past through 4.7%, I think the wheels come off on some of these small-cap stocks," Lang said.
